creator: Novara Media
description: James Butler is joined by Keir Milburn to discuss his new book 'Generation Left'. Why has age become a predictor of political preference? What does it mean to talk about generations in a political context? Do they detract from a class analysis? What happened to the generation of 2011? Where does conservatism come from? And what would happen if the left gave up its alibis? http://novaramedia.com/?p=13300
